p2p_enrich.notes: Added 3 repo CI/CD pass_to_pass gates: (1) test_repo_fake_pg_python_syntax - validates Python syntax of test/distributed/test_fake_pg.py, (2) test_repo_clang_format - validates FakeProcessGroup.hpp follows PyTorch clang-format rules, (3) test_repo_header_file_exists - validates target file exists and is readable. All 3 tests verified passing on base commit. CI commands discovered: clang-format (PyTorch CI lint workflow), python3 -m py_compile (Python syntax validation).

validate.notes: Fixed 2 issues: (1) Added clang and clang-format to Dockerfile - needed for test_syntax_valid and test_repo_clang_format, (2) Fixed _extract_allgather_loop() in test_outputs.py - original code looked for 'allgather' and 'override' on same line, but FakeProcessGroup.hpp has them on different lines. Updated extraction to handle multi-line function signatures. All 4 validation checks now pass: Docker build succeeds, NOP test reward=0 (f2p tests correctly fail on base), Gold test reward=1 (all 12 tests pass after fix), Rubric judge ICR=0.5 (expected - gold solution only modifies C++ header, no config files).
